Video.summary: Les Brown, with cameo appearances by Bob Proctor, David Meltzer, Mary Morrissey and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Les Brown

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Video.summary: Episode 3 of our Reality Show, Play to Win! It's down to the wire... who are you rooting for?!
Video.title: Play To Win Season 2- Episode 3

Video.summary: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Aptivio

Video.summary: Matthew Aarsvold, the owner and president of IKW Solutions, takes center stage, seeking $1,000,000 to elevate his innovative software, Constantly Current. This cutting-edge prototype promises to transform Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems by ensuring they remain updated seamlessly, offering potential time and cost savings for businesses.
Video.title: Fund Tank - IKW Solutions

Video.summary: Day 4 of Teaching the Teachers focuses on learning to hear the “small still voice for God” through prayer and meditation. It also explores spiritual guidance as an art—meeting others where they are, honoring intuitive limits, and teaching without reinforcing ego or victimhood.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 4

Video.summary: Day 5 of Teaching the Teachers reveals that spiritual health and mental health are one. Suffering comes from thinking apart from love, while healing comes through forgiveness and atonement. The role of therapist or teacher is to help remove the barriers to love’s presence.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 5

Video.summary: Day 6 of Teaching the Teachers reminds us that our worth comes from God, not success or recognition. True stature comes from grounding in what’s real, not clicks or followers. Teaching and service require integrity, generosity, and deep preparation—giving fully whether paid or not.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 6

Video.summary: Day 4 explores opening to joy by intentionally taking in the good. We examine habits of threat, perfectionism, and resistance, and practice savoring what’s nourishing and life-giving. Through gentle curiosity, this lesson shows how joy can restore resilience and help us meet life with more ease.
Video.title: Day 4 - Open to Joy

Video.summary: Day 5 introduces the practice of lovingkindness, or metta—a meditation rooted in connection and care. Using gentle phrases, we affirm our shared humanity and inner potential for growth and love. This practice invites curiosity rather than force, allowing experience to unfold naturally.
Video.title: Day 5 - Lovingkindness

Video.summary: Did you know being active in the gym could improve your activity in the bedroom? Everything you wanted to ask about sex but didn’t. Now you can on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out
Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out
Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out

Video.summary: A man gets terrible headaches right at the height of passion. And a woman won’t talk about her sexual desires. What should her partner do? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex
Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex
Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex

Video.summary: Over 800 Fights in her Life Professional MMA Fighter Julia Dorny, What get in Martial Arts when you train in over 6 Arts, you get the professional MMA Fighter in Julia Dorny! She is humble and amazing and is training for her upcoming fights. She is a podcaster with her show Women Hit Harder! Get ready and get involved in the conversation!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny

Video.summary: From Hell to Heaven's Doors, From Crime to having Quality Time Author Denise Jones! We are about to get deep in conversation with a young lady that came from the Chicago Crime , drugs and Jail to coming out to finding the light of success and glory! This will take you through the pain and passion of what she and her mom went through, turn your speakers up and get inspired!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones

Video.summary: R&B Singer Kerry James influenced by his Icons..So he dedicated a song to his Mom! Kerry James born in Chicago, but moved to the King of Pop Michael Jackson hometown Gary, Indiana and started signing and has been accomplishing many milestones in his life. We had a blast with Kerry and all of the things that he has accomplished and other obstacles! Support this gentleman!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James

Video.summary: A diagnosis of childhood cancer came as a shock to the Shoeneck family who found out about their daughter Kenedi's malignant tumor after an unexpected fall. This episode of Hope is Here proves the power of love and creativity as The Sing Me a Story Foundation pairs Kenedi and well-known songwriter Kat Perkins to create a happy and memorable tune that delivers hope, strength, and laughter to a family who needs a reason to smile.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E4

Video.summary: Our youth and all the experiences that makeup one's childhood, good and bad, can affect the person we ultimately become. Yet we often have a choice in that destiny. Ana Viamonte Ros is a woman who confirms that although insurmountable challenges and negative experiences from the past can shape our future, hard work and a determined, healthy mindset can pave the way toward a gratifying life. Today Dr. Viamonte dedicates her life to helping patients strengthen their mental health and conquer childhood traumas while serving as living proof that perseverance and hope make dreams attainable.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E5

Video.summary: The way to healing can take on different forms. Little 7-year-old Leonor, was suffering from a very rare cancer, and it was decided she needed an uplifting project to give her hope. What better medicine than an endearing song that was created from Lenore and her sister Dot's imagination and a ridiculously cute and famous dog named Doug the Pug? This episode of Hope is Here is about how a famous dog, creativity, and a group of caring individuals came together to give a little girl a world of hope to carry on. The path to healing can manifest in various ways. Meet Leonor, a resilient 7-year-old girl battling a highly uncommon form of cancer. Recognizing her need for inspiration and optimism, a heartwarming project was conceived. What could be more uplifting than a captivating melody born from the vivid imaginations of Leonor and her sister Dot, accompanied by the adorable and renowned Doug the Pug? In this episode of Hope is Here we witness the extraordinary convergence of a beloved canine, boundless creativity, and a compassionate community, all united to bestow upon a young girl a profound sense of hope for the future.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E6

Video.summary: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Video.summary: Laura Di Franco, CEO of Brave Healer Productions, discusses brave healing and the power of sharing our stories. And, meet Oyen the ginger cat and adorable kids from India, along with Daaji redefining meditation for a joyful heart.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Video.summary: Join The Kitchen Psychic, Hannah McKitrick, as we talk ditching diets, embracing food freedom, and finding lightness in mind and body, alongside Susan Noles from The Golden Bachelor for some fun, and meditation leader Daaji discussing compassion.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Video.summary: As humans, we need interconnection: We rely on others to survive, especially as children. Yet, we also strive for authenticity. This creates an inherent tension. In this lesson, Dr. Maté discusses what is true human nature — and how the modern world has warped our understanding of our needs.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Video.summary: Trauma is a wound that you sustain; it's not what happened to you. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains why traumatic wounds get triggered and how to understand triggers in your process of transformation and healing.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Video.summary: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Video.summary: Rock & Roll Hall of Fame Inductees, Rod Argent and Colin Blunstone of The Zombies, are today's guests on Life Stories with Marc Hoberman. Rod and Colin talk about their 50 plus years in Rock and Roll as well as their new album. The Legends who are famous for Time of the Season, She's Not There, and many more also offer sage advice for young, aspiring musicians.
Video.title: LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies

Image.alt: LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies
LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies
LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies

Video.summary: American Ninja Warrior Champion Daniel Gil talks about training, competition, homeschooling, and more.
Video.title: LSWMH - Daniel Gil

Video.summary: Radio icon and Radio Hall of Fame Inductee Shadoe Stevens is our guest on Life Stories with Marc Hoberman. Stevens talks about the obstacles he had to overcome in order to succeed in radio. He also talks about his children's book and the passion and drive needed to be successful. He credits FAILURE as the driving force of his success!
Video.title: LSWMH - Shadoe Stevens

Video.summary: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?
Video.title: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Video.summary: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?
Video.title: My Mother Terrifies Me

Video.summary: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.
Video.title: I Want to Be Famous

Video.summary: Blaine Bartlett, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett

Video.summary: Cynthia Kersey, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Blaine Bartlett, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Cynthia Kersey
